title: Build the two-stage retrieval pipeline
description: Assemble embed, first-stage retrieve, rerank, and context-assembly stages, measuring recall and precision at each.
body: Steps: 1. Embed the query with the same model used for documents. 2. Retrieve a wide candidate set for recall. 3. Rerank candidates for precision and select top-k. 4. Deduplicate and assemble context within the window with citations. 5. Measure first-stage recall and final top-k precision on a labeled set. Rollback point: before changing the embedding or index. Validation: recall at stage one and precision after rerank are both reported and the relevant passage survives into context.
